languages.text: "Воистину сказано, презревшие страх неуязвимы под сенью Его!" {n}Арджента салютует слегка стушевавшемуся юноше.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Воистину сказано, презревшие страх неуязвимы под сенью Его!" {n}Арджента салютует слегка стушевавшемуся юноше.{/n}
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "It is true what they say: those who spurn fear are invincible beneath His shadow!" {n}Argenta salutes the somewhat flustered youth.{/n}

languages.text: «Es verdad lo que dicen, ¡quienes rechazan el miedo son invencibles bajo Su sombra!». {n}Argenta saluda al joven nervioso.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It is true what they say: those who spurn fear are invincible beneath His shadow!" {n}Argenta salutes the somewhat flustered youth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Es verdad lo que dicen, ¡quienes rechazan el miedo son invencibles bajo Su sombra!». {n}Argenta saluda al joven nervioso.{/n}

languages.text: “人们说得没错：凡蔑视恐惧之人，在祂的荫庇之下，皆不可战胜！”{n}阿洁塔向那位略显慌乱的年轻人敬了个礼。{/n}
languages.original_text: "It is true what they say: those who spurn fear are invincible beneath His shadow!" {n}Argenta salutes the somewhat flustered youth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “人们说得没错：凡蔑视恐惧之人，在祂的荫庇之下，皆不可战胜！”{n}阿洁塔向那位略显慌乱的年轻人敬了个礼。{/n}

languages.text: « C’est on ne peut plus vrai : ceux qui rejettent la peur sont invincibles dans Son ombre ! » {n}Argenta salue le jeune homme quelque peu empourpré.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It is true what they say: those who spurn fear are invincible beneath His shadow!" {n}Argenta salutes the somewhat flustered youth.{/n}

languages.text: "Dedikleri doğruymuş: Korkuyu reddedenler, O'nun gölgesi altında yenilmez oluyor!" {n}Argenta, biraz telaşlanmış gence selam veriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It is true what they say: those who spurn fear are invincible beneath His shadow!" {n}Argenta salutes the somewhat flustered youth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Dedikleri doğruymuş: Korkuyu reddedenler, O'nun gölgesi altında yenilmez oluyor!" {n}Argenta, biraz telaşlanmış gence selam veriyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Es ist wahr, was die Leute sagen: Wer keine Furcht kennt, ist unter Seinem Schatten unbesiegbar!" {n}Argenta begrüßt den etwas verlegenen Jüngling.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It is true what they say: those who spurn fear are invincible beneath His shadow!" {n}Argenta salutes the somewhat flustered youth.{/n}

languages.text: 「恐れを捨てた者は、彼の影の下では無敵だ」と彼らは言うのも本当だ！{n}アルジェンタは少し慌てた若者を敬礼する。{/n}
